title: Colorblind Diamonds
description: Shifts the hue of diamond items to make them distinguishable from iron items, by and for colourblind people.
body:
# Colourblind Diamonds
This is a resource pack intended to help with differentiating diamond items from iron items. It simply shifts the hue for all diamond textures in the game to appear more blue.

![A screenshot from minecraft showcasing all of the affected items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f393dcfc16383f0adea5f857c4bd63ca8520f9.png)

It is designed mainly for players with protanopia, as that's what I have.
